zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破延续
zh.content:
BNB/USD最新报651.21，价格维持在20日均线646.26上方运行，显示短期多头仍占据主动。24小时波动区间较窄，说明市场情绪偏谨慎，但整体结构尚未出现明显转弱信号。

从技术指标观察，MACD处于零轴下方且数值为负，表明中期动能仍偏弱，不过跌幅逐渐收敛，空头力量正在减弱。RSI数据暂未形成参考，但当前价格稳定于均线之上，对短线走势形成一定支撑。

关键支撑位可关注648附近，若失守则可能回踩645与640区域；上方阻力则集中在652至655区间，一旦有效突破，价格有机会进一步挑战660整数关口，市场波动率或同步放大。

交易策略方面，短线更适合采取回调低吸思路，等待价格确认突破652后再顺势跟进。若后续成交量无法放大，则需警惕冲高回落风险，建议严格设置止损并控制仓位比例。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is maintaining a constructive short-term structure with price trading at 651.21, holding above the 20-day SMA at 646.26. The modest 24-hour gain of 0.32% and the session range between 648.97 and 651.77 suggest controlled upward momentum rather than aggressive buying. Remaining above the moving average keeps the near-term trend mildly bullish, while the market appears to be consolidating after recent advances rather than entering a reversal phase.

Indicator signals are mixed but not decisively bearish. The negative MACD reading at -1.48365 indicates residual downside momentum from earlier price action, although the lack of signal-line confirmation limits conviction. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment relies more heavily on price positioning and moving averages. Since BNB remains above the SMA(20), buyers still retain technical control unless price closes decisively below the 646 region.

Immediate support is forming around 649.00, aligned with the intraday low at 648.97, while stronger structural support sits near the SMA(20) around 646.30. A break below this zone could expose deeper retracement pressure toward 642–643. On the upside, resistance is clustered near 652.00, followed by a broader breakout area around 655.00 where momentum traders may become more active.

Trading strategy currently favors a cautious bullish bias. Short-term traders may consider buying pullbacks toward 648–646 with tight risk controls below support. Momentum entries become more attractive only after a confirmed move above 652–655. Conversely, failure to defend the moving average would weaken the setup and shift focus toward range trading or defensive positioning until momentum indicators improve.
